Home.title: Building the Future, Starting Today
Home.subtitle: We create modern spaces with high-performance infrastructure and superstructure solutions.
Home.slide1_desc: Track your business from anywhere. Monitor all processes from production to sales instantly with our mobile software.
Home.slide2_desc: Maximize efficiency with comprehensive analytics, automated reports, and integrations. Turn big data into actionable insights.
Home.slide3_desc: Bring your projects to life down to the finest detail with our industrial laser cutting machines. Fast, reliable, and high quality.
Home.why_sub: We push excellence beyond our standards.
Home.f1_d: We are always by your side with our live support and expert team for uninterrupted service.
Home.f2_d: Micron-level accuracy in laser cutting and production processes.
Home.f3_d: Zero-defect target with ISO-certified processes, 100% customer satisfaction.
Home.f4_d: Guaranteed quick shipment from stock and on-time project-based delivery.
Home.dual_desc: Sezkon prepares your business for the future by blending the physical power of industry with the intelligence of digital.
Home.cnc_d: We produce specialized parts for defense, aviation, and machinery sectors with our high-precision CNC machining centers.
Home.soft_d: We develop custom software to digitalize your business processes, increase efficiency, and strengthen your decision-making mechanisms.
Home.st1_d: Our engineers review your project technically and determine the most efficient approach.
Home.st2_d: Risks are minimized through software architecture or production simulations.
Home.st3_d: Your project comes to life in our state-of-the-art facility or development environment.
Home.cta_d: We are just a click away from bringing modern and technological solutions to your engineering challenges.

About.hero_desc: Serving with a dual expertise model in software technologies and CNC production since 2013, Sezkon continues to be the industry's most reliable technology partner.
About.mis_p1: Positioned at the intersection of industry and the digital world, Sezkon transforms its clients' business processes with deep expertise in both fields.
About.mis_p2: With our ISO 9001 certified quality management system, 0.05mm precision production line, and experience from hundreds of corporate software projects, we provide the best solution for each specific project.
About.val_1_d: We work with a zero-defect target in every project, continuously raising quality standards.
About.val_2_d: We develop solutions that push the boundaries of technology, steering the industry.
About.val_3_d: With 10+ years of experience, we deliver on our promises to clients on time.
About.val_4_d: We build long-term partnerships with our clients by fostering collective intelligence.
About.t1_d: Founded with a small team. Our first CNC machine was commissioned.
About.t2_d: We established our software unit focusing on ERP and process automation projects.
About.t3_d: We started smart factory solutions and IoT integration projects.
About.t4_d: We continued our growth with 50+ corporate clients and exports to 3 continents.
About.t5_d: We cemented our pioneering position in the sector with AI-supported production solutions.
About.team_1_d: Guides the company's vision with mechanical engineering and software infrastructure.
About.team_2_d: Manages digital transformation projects with 15 years of software development experience.
About.team_3_d: Ensures quality assurance with 12 years of experience in CNC and laser processes.
About.cta_p: Our experts will contact you within 24 hours.

SrvCnc.meta_title: CNC Machining | Sezkon – 5-Axis Milling and Turning
SrvCnc.meta_desc: 5-axis CNC milling, turning, and complex part production for defense, aviation, and automotive.
SrvCnc.hero_desc: With ±0.005mm precision and simultaneous 5-axis capability, we produce complex parts for defense, aviation, and automotive sectors.
SrvCnc.cta_desc: Our engineering team conducts a technical review to offer the optimal machining strategy and pricing.
SrvCnc.c1_d: Zero setup time and flawless accuracy by machining multiple surfaces in one hold.
SrvCnc.c2_d: We create ideal tool paths utilizing SolidCAM and MasterCAM and minimize processing time.
SrvCnc.c3_d: All critical measurements are verified via CMM in our temperature-controlled QA room.
SrvCnc.c4_d: Turnkey solutions including anodizing, chrome plating, heat treatment, and grinding.

SrvSoft.meta_title: Custom Software Development | Sezkon – Enterprise Solutions
SrvSoft.meta_desc: Custom software development for ERP, CRM, MES. Enterprise software with Agile methodology and modern tech stack.
SrvSoft.hero_desc: We step in where off-the-shelf solutions fall short. We develop scalable custom software that perfectly reflects your business processes.
SrvSoft.cta_desc: Contact us today for a free preliminary analysis meeting.
SrvSoft.f1_d: Unify production, inventory, accounting and HR in a single module.
SrvSoft.f2_d: Increase sales power with funnel tracking, quote management and customer analysis.
SrvSoft.f3_d: Track OEE by getting realtime data directly from machines.
SrvSoft.f4_d: Secure platforms for dealers to track orders and balances.
SrvSoft.st1_d: Fast and modern UI with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS.
SrvSoft.st2_d: Microservices architecture with Node.js, NestJS and Python.
SrvSoft.st3_d: High data processing speed with PostgreSQL, MongoDB and Redis.
SrvSoft.st4_d: Continuous deployment via Docker, Kubernetes and CI/CD.
SrvSoft.p1_d: Requirements engineering and software architecture formulation.
SrvSoft.p2_d: Creating modern, user experience focused prototypes.
SrvSoft.p3_d: Modular development using Agile sprints and regular reviews.
SrvSoft.p4_d: Extensive QA processes and secure release after closed betas.

SrvSheet.meta_desc: High-precision laser cutting up to 30mm for mild steel, stainless, and galvanized sheets.
SrvSheet.hero_desc: We cut mild steel, stainless steel, and galvanized materials up to 30mm with high precision, backed by bending and welding services upon request.
SrvSheet.cta_desc: Contact us with your DXF or DWG file, and our engineers will prepare the most efficient cutting plan.
SrvSheet.c1_d: Smooth, burr-free cuts on 30mm carbon steel and 20mm stainless steel utilizing 12kW laser power.
SrvSheet.c2_d: Not only for flat plates! We precisely cut round and square tubes utilizing an integrated rotary axis.
SrvSheet.c3_d: Optimum placement with advanced CAD/CAM reduces material waste under 15%.
SrvSheet.c4_d: We provide end-to-end service alongside press brake, welding, and electrostatic painting units.

SrvWeb.meta_title: Web Design Services | Sezkon – Corporate Web Solutions
SrvWeb.meta_desc: Corporate, SEO-friendly, high-performance web design with Next.js and React.
SrvWeb.hero_desc: We design fast, SEO-friendly, and conversion-oriented websites that represent your brand perfectly in the digital world.
SrvWeb.feat_desc: Everything you need to stay ahead of the competition under one roof.
SrvWeb.cta_desc: Fill out the form for a free preliminary evaluation, and we'll reply within 24 hours.
SrvWeb.f1_d: Stand out in Google rankings with technical SEO, Core Web Vitals, and speed optimization.
SrvWeb.f2_d: Flawless view and experience on every device and screen size.
SrvWeb.f3_d: UX-driven design decisions that turn visitors into customers.
SrvWeb.f4_d: Fast, reliable, and maintainable code with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
SrvWeb.p1_d: We deeply analyze your brand identity, target audience, and competitive positioning.
SrvWeb.p2_d: We create wireframes and interactive prototypes in Figma for your approval.
SrvWeb.p3_d: We bring the approved design to life with a modern tech stack.
SrvWeb.p4_d: Cross-browser testing, performance analysis, and seamless deployment.

SrvApp.meta_title: Mobile App Development | Sezkon – iOS & Android Solutions
SrvApp.meta_desc: Native performance mobile app development for iOS and Android with React Native.
SrvApp.hero_desc: Manage all your business processes from your pocket. We build high-performance corporate apps for iOS and Android using React Native.
SrvApp.cta_desc: We turn your idea into a tangible product in a short time with rapid prototyping.
SrvApp.f1_d: High-performance applications running at native speed on both iOS and Android with a single codebase.
SrvApp.f2_d: Modern, fluid, and animated interface designs tailored to user habits.
SrvApp.f3_d: Powerful server architecture capable of handling thousands of concurrent users, fully encrypted.
SrvApp.f4_d: Full access to native device hardware like cameras, GPS, Bluetooth, and push notifications.
SrvApp.s1_d: Shopping apps offering loyalty programs and quick checkout.
SrvApp.s2_d: Field operation apps providing live courier tracking and route optimization.
SrvApp.s3_d: Video calling, appointment scheduling, and patient tracking systems.
SrvApp.f5_d: Offline-first architecture that keeps working even without internet connection.
SrvApp.f6_d: Seamless integration and sync with your existing ERP and CRM systems.

SrvEcom.meta_desc: B2B and B2C e-commerce infrastructure, payment integration, stock management.
SrvEcom.hero_desc: We build scalable and secure sales platforms that meet all B2B and B2C e-commerce needs.
SrvEcom.inc_desc: All the infrastructure you need to grow your business is ready and included.
SrvEcom.cta_desc: Get your live e-commerce store within 48 hours.
SrvEcom.f1_d: Fully customized interfaces that reflect the power of your brand.
SrvEcom.f2_d: No-data-storage principle for credit cards, SSL certificates, and up-to-date security protocols.
SrvEcom.f3_d: Optimized experience for mobile devices where 70% of sales occur.
SrvEcom.f4_d: Easily manage your products, orders, and shipping processes from a single screen.
SrvEcom.inc1_d: Fully compatible checkout with Iyzico, PayTR, Stripe and all bank virtual POS infrastructures.
SrvEcom.inc2_d: Single-center inventory and price management with platforms like Amazon, eBay.
SrvEcom.inc3_d: Barcode integration with major shipping companies.
SrvEcom.inc4_d: Detailed graphics for sales trends, visitor statistics, and conversion rates.
SrvEcom.f5_d: Full protection of customer and payment data with the highest security standards.
SrvEcom.f6_d: Flawless shopping experience for 70%+ mobile visitors with mobile-first design approach.

SrvInd.meta_title: Industry 4.0 Solutions | Sezkon – Smart Factory & IoT
SrvInd.meta_desc: IoT sensor networks, AI-based quality control, OPC-UA protocol, and digital twin technologies.
SrvInd.hero_desc: Increase your production efficiency by up to 25% with IoT sensors, AI-based quality control, digital twins.
SrvInd.why_d1: Most digital transformation companies know software but not manufacturing; CNC companies know manufacturing but not software.
SrvInd.why_d2: Sezkon is one of the rare companies expert in both worlds. Our shop floor experience shapes our digital solutions to real needs.
SrvInd.cta_desc: Let's discover together where you are and where you can go with a free digital maturity assessment.
SrvInd.cta_sub: Reply in 24 hours · Free · No Commitment
SrvInd.s1_d: We collect realtime data from your production line by networking all CNC, Sensors, and PLC devices.
SrvInd.s2_d: Providing simulations and scenario planning without physical risk by building an exact 3D replica of your plant.
SrvInd.s3_d: Detecting and isolating defective parts within milliseconds through AI-driven computer vision quality control systems.
SrvInd.s4_d: Analyzing machine vibrations and temperatures using ML models to alert maintenance teams strictly before failures occur.
SrvInd.r1_d: Current system analysis, data source mapping and digital transformation roadmap creation.
SrvInd.r2_d: IoT sensor installation on a single line, SCADA integration and dashboard go-live.
SrvInd.r3_d: Expanding pilot success plant-wide, deploying AI modules and team training.
SrvInd.r4_d: System optimization, new AI model development and increasing plant digital maturity.
why_list: Solutions tested in our own factory
SAP, Oracle and Siemens integration exp.
Flexible solutions from prototype to enterprise

SrvBend.meta_title: Bending | Sezkon – CNC Press Brake Services
SrvBend.meta_desc: Precision sheet metal bending with CNC press brake. Tolerances of ±0.2° with 320-ton capacity presses.
SrvBend.hero_desc: We produce complex profiles with ±0.2° angle tolerance using our 320-ton CNC press brakes, offering integrated laser cutting services.
SrvBend.prof_desc: In addition to standard profiles, we produce custom form profiles tailored to your technical drawings.
SrvBend.cta_desc: Combine your laser cutting and bending processes in one company. No extra shipping costs, transfer times, or coordination hurdles.
SrvBend.s6_v: Y1, Y2, X, R, Z1, Z2
SrvBend.c1_d: Collision tests are performed in 3D environment before the actual bending process to eliminate scrap rate.
SrvBend.c2_d: Easily bend deep U and Z forms utilizing an extensive die range and gooseneck punches.
SrvBend.c3_d: We process thick chassis and body sheets up to 4 meters continuously in a single flow without buckling.
SrvBend.c4_d: Scratch-free operation on painted, stainless or delicate aluminum sheets using special urethane films.

SrvAlum.meta_title: Aluminum Laser Cutting | Sezkon – Industrial Laser Processing
SrvAlum.meta_desc: High-precision aluminum laser cutting services. Industrial aluminum processing with 0.05mm tolerance.
SrvAlum.hero_desc: With our 6000W fiber laser technology, we process your aluminum parts with ±0.05mm precision and oxide-free surface quality.
SrvAlum.mat_desc: From aerospace to marine, structural applications to defense, we process a broad range of aluminum alloys.
SrvAlum.cta_desc: Attach your DXF, DWG, or STEP file, and our engineers will offer the optimal solution.
SrvAlum.c1_d: Excellent cut quality including complex geometries within ±0.05mm tolerance.
SrvAlum.c2_d: 5x faster cutting than standard methods utilizing 6000W fiber laser.
SrvAlum.c3_d: Oxidation is prevented using nitrogen gas, leading to perfect surface quality for painting/coating.
SrvAlum.c4_d: Standard orders in 3-5 days, express orders ready in 24-48 hours.
